STATE_ID STATE_ID State ID CHAR 2 The two-digit state abbreviation. This may also be the two-character CMS region code.
31 STPRPDDT ST_PREPD_DT State Prepared Date DATE 8 This field represents the date when the state prepared the data to be pulled to the national. Used for replication purposes only.
32 SBMSSNDT SUBMISSION_DATE Submission Date DATE 8 The date the submission was received by the system.
33 SUB_REQ SUB_REQ Submission Requirement CHAR 1 0 = Default for all records prior to the
